shorts.title: Thousands without power across NEPA amid thunderstorms
shorts.title_distilled: Thousands without power across NEPA amid thunderstorms.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — As thunderstorms and showers make their way across the Keystone State, several communities are experiencing power outages Saturday evening. PPL is reporting that as many as nearly 23,300 of their customers were experiencing power outages. Of that number, over 2,800 customers were without power in Luzerne County. In Hickory Hills outside of White [...]

shorts.title: Basketball legend Bobby Sura returns to NEPA
shorts.title_distilled: Basketball legend Bobby Sura returns to NEPA.
shorts.description: PLAINS TOWNSHIP, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It's a big honor for a Wilkes-Barre native who made his mark in high school, college, and the NBA. Bobby Sura is back in the Wilkes-Barre area for his induction into the Luzerne County Sports Hall of Fame. But before that, he visited with Wilkes-Barre Area Basketball Players and [...]

shorts.title: Turning history into crafts at Arts on Fire Festival
shorts.title_distilled: Turning history into crafts at Arts on Fire Festival.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It's a chance to turn local history into something you can take home: Crowds are filling the Scranton Iron Furnaces this weekend for the annual Arts on Fire Festival. The event features live music, craft vendors, and demonstrations celebrating the city's industrial past. One of the biggest attractions is the [...]
